title: trichophorum rigidum subsp. rigidum
intro: Trichophorum rigidum subsp. rigidum, also known as Cottongrass or Trichophorum, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Trichophorum rigidum subsp. rigidum include relieving digestive issues, treating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies in combination with other plants, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
